app.name: Readur
app.one_liner: A modern, self-hosted document management system with OCR, secure authentication, and role-based access control.

screens.name: Admin Settings
screens.purpose: Configure system settings, manage users, and view authentication options including OIDC/SSO.

screens.name: Document Dashboard
screens.purpose: View, search, and manage uploaded documents with OCR-extracted text.
primary_actions: Filter by file type or date

rust_commands.name: reset_admin_password
rust_commands.purpose: Regenerate and output a new secure admin password via CLI.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist uploaded document metadata and extracted OCR text to storage.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build React drag-and-drop upload UI
week 1: Set up Rust backend with JWT auth and bcrypt
acceptance_tests: Admin can reset password using CLI command without downtime.
On first startup, system generates and logs a secure admin password exactly once.
User can upload a PDF and search its OCR-extracted text within 5 seconds.
